description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with three jobs using the default test stage. The build-android job uses the nitlang/nit:latest-full image and runs the command `GITLAB_USER_NAME=`echo $GITLAB_USER_NAME | tr \\xE8 e` make bin/dawn_arrival.apk`, then saves bin/dawn_arrival.apk as an artifact. The build-linux job also uses nitlang/nit:latest-full, runs `NO_STACKTRACE=True make bin/dawn_arrival`, and saves bin/dawn_arrival and the assets/ directory as artifacts. The unit-tests job uses nitlang/nit:latest and runs `make check`. No caches, services, variables, or rules are defined.
